violations.text: The establishment has an accumulation of dead insects. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to deep clean establishment, establishment is to maintain pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
Establishment using Ortho Home Defense insect spray. Establishments are to use licensed pest control company. Establishment to clean and sanitize areas sprayed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by insects. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with licensed pest control company. Establishment is to provide inspection report to RIDOH. Establishment is to clean and sanitize all areas with insects present. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
